zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Franks於1794年1月9日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普希霍斯時，她的父親Henry Franks30歲，母親Christina Maurer Mason29歲。她於1816年2月28日與Captain John William Routson結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1850年住在美國俄亥俄州韋恩其瓦 堂史普且於1860年住在美國俄亥俄州韋恩。她去世於1864年12月6日享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Franks于1794年1月9日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普希霍斯时，她的父亲Henry Franks30岁，母亲Christina Maurer Mason29岁。她于1816年2月28日与Captain John William Routson结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1850年住在美国俄亥俄州韋恩其瓦 堂史普且于1860年住在美国俄亥俄州韋恩。她去世于1864年12月6日享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Franks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from   Frank  .
English: perhaps sometimes a variant of Frankish, an ethnic name from Middle English frankys ‘French, Frenchman’ (Old English frencisc), for someone from France.

variants.name: Frank
meanings: German, Dutch, Scandinavian, Slovenian, Croatian, Czech, Slovak, Polish, Hungarian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): ethnic or habitational name for someone from Franconia (German Franken), a region of southwestern Germany so called from its early settlement by the Franks, an ancient Germanic people who inhabited the lands around the River Rhine in Roman times. In the 6th–9th centuries, under leaders such as Clovis I (c. 466–511) and Charlemagne (742–814), the Franks established a substantial empire in western Europe, from which the country of France takes its name.

English (of Norman origin), Dutch, and German: from the personal name Frank (Norman French Franco, ancient Germanic Franko), in origin an ethnic name for a Frank, or from German Franke ‘Frank(ish), Franconian’ (compare 1 above). This also came to be used as an adjective meaning ‘free, open-hearted, generous’ (Middle English and Old French franc ‘free’, i.e. not a serf or slave), deriving from the fact that in Frankish Gaul only people of Frankish race enjoyed the status of fully free men. As a surname of German origin it is also found (in both possible meanings; see 1 above) in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Franc and Franck .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.
Ohio was the first state admitted to the Union from the Northwest Territory.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Making States Equal
historicEvents.description: The Missouri Compromise helped provide the entrance of Maine as a free state and Missouri as a slave state into the United States. As part of the compromise, slavery was prohibited north of the 36°30′ parallel, excluding Missouri.

historicEvents.title: The Black Hawk War
historicEvents.description: Convinced that a group of Native American tribes were hostile, The United States formed a frontier militia to stop them in their tracks. Even though Black Hawk was hoping to avoid bloodshed while trying to resettle on tribal land, U.S. officials opened fire on the Native Americans. Black Hawk then responded to this confrontation by successfully attacking the militia at the Battle of Stillman's Run and then left northward. After a few months the militia caught up with Black Hawk and his men and defeated them at the Battle of Wisconsin Heights. While being weakened by hunger, injuries and desertion, Black Hawk and the rest of the many native survivors retreated towards the Mississippi. Unfortunately, Black Hawk and other leaders were later captured when they surrendered to the US forces and were then imprisoned for a year.

historicEvents.title: Kirtland Temple Dedicated
historicEvents.description: On March 27, 1836, the Kirtland Temple was dedicated.

historicEvents.title: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War
historicEvents.description: Although divided as a state on the subject of slavery, Ohio participated in the Civil War on the Union's side, providing over 300,000 troops. Ohio provided the 3rd largest number of troops by any Union state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War

historicEvents.description: Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Franks was born on 9 January 1794, in Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States, her father, Henry Franks, was 30 and her mother, Christina Maurer Mason, was 29. She married Captain John William Routson on 28 February 1816. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She lived in Chippewa Township, Wayne, Ohio, United States in 1850 and Wayne, Ohio, United States in 1860. She died on 6 December 1864, at the age of 70.

Elle a épousé Captain John William Routson le 28 février 1816. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle a vécu à Chippewa Township, Wayne, Ohio, États-Unis en 1850 et à Wayne, Ohio, États-Unis en 1860. Elle est décédée le 6 décembre 1864, à l’âge de 70 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Franks è nata il il 9 gennaio 1794 nel Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Henry Franks, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Christina Maurer Mason, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Captain John William Routson il 28 febbraio 1816. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Chippewa Township, Wayne, Ohio, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850 e nel Wayne, Ohio, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1860. Morì il 6 dicembre 1864, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Highhouse, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United: アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットジャーマン トウンシュイップヒグhハウゼ
ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Franksが1794年1月9日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットジャーマン トウンシュイップヒグhハウゼで生まれた時，父Henry Franksは30歳，母Christina Maurer Masonは29歳であった。1816年2月28日にCaptain John William Routsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州ワインチップエワ トウンシュイップに，1860年にはアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州ワインに住んでいた。彼女は1864年12月6日に70歳で死去した。

ko.Chippewa Township, Wayne, Ohio, United S: 미국 오하이오 주 웨이인 치p와 타운시프
ko.New Portage, Summit, Ohio, United States: 미국 오하이오 주 수미 노르턴 타운시프 뉴 포타지
ko.Highhouse, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프 히그h하스
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Franks(이)가 1794년 1월 9일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프 히그h하스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Franks(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christina Maurer Mason(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1816년 2월 28일 Captain John William Routson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 오하이오 주 웨이인 치p와 타운시프에서, 1860년도에 미국 오하이오 주 웨이인에서 살았다. 그녀는 1864년 12월 6일 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Franks nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1794, em Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Henry Franks, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Christina Maurer Mason, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Captain John William Routson em 28 de fevereiro de 1816. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela viveu em Chippewa Township, Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América em 1850 e em Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América em 1860. Ela faleceu em 6 de dezembro de 1864, com 70 anos.

ru.Highhouse, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United: хаихоус, джирман тоуншип, феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Franks родилась 9 января 1794 г. в местности хаихоус, джирман тоуншип, феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Henry Franks было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina Maurer Mason, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Captain John William Routson 28 февраля 1816 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она жила в местности чиппюа тоуншип, веин, Огайо, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году и в местности веин, Огайо, Соединенные штаты в 1860 году. Она умерла 6 декабря 1864 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Franks nació el 9 de enero de 1794, en Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, su papá, Henry Franks, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Christina Maurer Mason, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Captain John William Routson el 28 de febrero de 1816. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Chippewa Township, Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos en 1850 y en Wayne, Ohio, Estados Unidos en 1860. Murió el 6 de diciembre de 1864, a la edad de 70 años.
